condition.prompt_addendum: Before returning, verify this checklist: response is a non-empty string; open_items is an array with exactly one object; open_items[0].kind is a non-empty string; open_items[0].text is a non-empty string; schedule_requests is an array with exactly one object; schedule_requests[0].purpose is a non-empty string; schedule_requests[0].requested_context includes the requested recall record_id. Return only the JSON object.
